summary: Detailed implementation plan for building a fullscreen Python TV/media center application similar to LibreELEC. Covers technology stack (PySide6 + Qt Quick/QML), architecture, media playback via python-vlc, system settings control (volume, brightness, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, power), file scanning, and 10-foot UI design with keyboard/gamepad navigation. Includes file-by-file breakdown, dependency list, and verification plan.
